prompt:
(masterpiece, best quality, 8K, ultra-detailed), Japanese manga style, refined ink outlines and moderate line weight, screentone shading, high contrast, dramatic shadows, hand-drawn illustration aesthetic, full-body front-view portrait, pure white background, single character, extremely handsome young male with refined delicate features, flawless skin, outstanding temperament, mysterious aura with subtle ethereal glow in eyes suggesting special perception abilities.

--面部系统--
8K hyper-realistic anime facial modeling, refined manga-style line art with soft outlines, extremely handsome defined jawline, intense mystical gaze with subtle ethereal shimmer, soft ink outlines around eyes and lips, delicate iris highlights with hint of supernatural gleam, slight bloodshot texture on sclera, matte translucent lip color, lip peak highlight strength 0.3, lip line depth 0.15, flawless porcelain skin texture.

--头发系统--
defined hair strands with refined outlines, distinct clumps of hair with screentone shading, intricate hair strands, root fixation coefficient 0.95, tip swing amplitude 10cm, color layering: main color #8B4513, secondary color #A0522D, highlight #D2B48C, shadow #654321, 3-5 strands of gradient per cluster, natural color transition, physical wind simulation: point wind source behind neck (wind speed 1.2m/s, turbulence intensity 5%), wind direction 45°.

--衣物系统--
crisp clothing with clean folds and soft outlines, subtle screentone on fabric, slight shoulder line folds (depth 0.3), fabric: matte texture, casual yet refined appearance, simple modern clothing suitable for summer afternoons, clean lines and minimalist design.

--视角与构图--
perspective locked: full-body front view, eye-level, focal length 50mm, depth of field f/2.8, focal plane on character, pure white background only, no background elements, action constraints: standing straight, arms relaxed at sides, completely static, no unnecessary movements., no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words, aspect ratio 1024:1536, portrait orientation

back.prompt:
Generate a full-body, back-view portrait of character protagonist based on the provided front-view portrait, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. No facial features should be visible.
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.

side.prompt:
Generate a full-body, side-view portrait of character protagonist based on the provided front-view portrait, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Facing left. Standing with arms relaxed at sides.
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
